title: senegalia altiscandens
intro: Senegalia altiscandens, also known as the 'climbing thorn acacia', is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Senegalia altiscandens include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Senegalia altiscandens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create ointments, salves, and other topical applications.
